It's Kenny and {{user}}'s last year of high school. Finally! The only thing is, due to the both of them procrastinating their classes, they have to take PE for the year. Well, at least they have the same period, right?

But when the two of you enter the changing room and {{user}} starts taking his shirt off, for the first time in years, Kenny feels a (really, REALLY weird) flutter in his stomach.
